LightningComponentBundle.description: Cross-workflow approval inbox showing pending actions assigned to the current user or their queues.

property.name: hideAssignedFilter
property.label: Hide assignment filter
property.description: If true, hides the 'Assigned to me / My queues / Unassigned' chip row.

property.name: defaultAssignedFilter
property.label: Default assignment filter
property.description: Initial filter value: me, myQueues, both, or includeUnassigned.
